glosses.tr: ne kadar ..., o kadar ...; daha da
glosses.ro: cu cât ..., cu atât ...; și mai mult
glosses.ja: 〜すればするほど; なおさら

translations.nl: Dan is het alleen maar beter.
translations.hi: तो फिर और भी अच्छा है.
translations.ja: それなら、なおさらいいね。

tokens.explanation: Temporal/discourse adverb introducing or sequencing the statement.
Finite copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present) linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Personal pronoun functioning as the subject (often a syntactic/anticipatory ‘it’).
Degree adverb used in correlative/comparative constructions; intensifies the following comparative.
Comparative predicative adjective serving as the complement of the copula.

translations.en: That makes me even more nervous.
translations.es: Eso me pone aún más nervioso.
translations.fr: Ça me rend encore plus nerveux.
translations.it: Questo mi rende ancora più nervoso.
translations.pt: Isso me deixa ainda mais nervoso.
translations.vi: Điều đó làm tôi càng lo lắng hơn.
translations.uk: Від цього я ще більше нервую.
translations.hi: इससे मैं और भी घबरा जाता हूँ.
translations.nb: Det gjør meg enda mer nervøs.
translations.sv: Det gör mig ännu mer nervös.
translations.ro: Asta mă face și mai nervos.
translations.da: Det gør mig endnu mere nervøs.
translations.ja: それでますます緊張する。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the subject, referring to a situation or prior discourse.
Lexical verb in 3rd person singular present; causative meaning (‘makes’).
1st person singular accusative personal pronoun; direct object and experiencer of the causative verb.
Degree adverb intensifying the comparative adjective that follows.
Comparative predicate adjective serving as an object complement describing the resulting state of ‘mich’.

sentences.target: Ich freue mich umso mehr auf morgen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁɔɪ̯ə mɪç ʊmˈzoː meːɐ̯ aʊ̯f ˈmɔʁɡn̩/

translations.de: Ich freue mich umso mehr auf morgen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁɔɪ̯ə mɪç ʊmˈzoː meːɐ̯ aʊ̯f ˈmɔʁɡn̩/
translations.en: I’m even more excited for tomorrow.
translations.es: Tengo aún más ganas de que llegue mañana.
translations.fr: J’ai encore plus hâte d’être à demain.
translations.it: Sono ancora più impaziente per domani.
translations.ru: Я жду завтрашнего дня с ещё большим нетерпением.
translations.pt: Estou ainda mais animado para amanhã.
translations.tr: Yarını daha da çok sabırsızlıkla bekliyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi càng mong chờ ngày mai hơn.
translations.nl: Ik kijk nog meer uit naar morgen.
translations.uk: Я ще більше чекаю на завтра.
translations.hi: मैं कल का और भी बेसब्री से इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Jeszcze bardziej nie mogę się doczekać jutra.
translations.el: Ανυπομονώ για το αύριο ακόμα περισσότερο.
translations.nb: Jeg gleder meg enda mer til i morgen.
translations.sv: Jag ser ännu mer fram emot i morgon.
translations.ro: Aștept ziua de mâine și mai nerăbdător.
translations.cs: Na zítřek se těším ještě víc.
translations.da: Jeg glæder mig endnu mere til i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日がますます楽しみだ。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (1st person singular present); part of the reflexive-prepositional verb construction ‘sich auf etwas freuen’ (‘to look forward to’).
Reflexive pronoun (1st person singular accusative) required by ‘freuen’ in this sense.
Degree adverb intensifying the comparative degree expression.
Comparative adverb modifying the intensity/degree of the emotional state expressed by ‘freue mich’.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces the anticipated target/time of ‘sich freuen’.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘tomorrow’; here the object of anticipation within the prepositional phrase.

sentences.target: Ohne Kaffee bin ich umso müder.

translations.de: Ohne Kaffee bin ich umso müder.
translations.en: Without coffee, I’m even more tired.
translations.es: Sin café, estoy aún más cansado.
translations.fr: Sans café, je suis encore plus fatigué.
translations.it: Senza caffè, sono ancora più stanco.
translations.pt: Sem café, fico ainda mais cansado.
translations.he: בלי קפה אני עוד יותר עייף.
translations.vi: Không có cà phê thì tôi còn mệt hơn.
translations.nl: Zonder koffie ben ik nog vermoeider.
translations.hi: कॉफी के बिना मैं और भी थका हुआ रहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Bez kawy jestem jeszcze bardziej zmęczony.
translations.el: Χωρίς καφέ είμαι ακόμα πιο κουρασμένος.
translations.nb: Uten kaffe er jeg enda trøttere.
translations.id: Tanpa kopi aku jadi makin lelah.
translations.sv: Utan kaffe blir jag ännu tröttare.
translations.ro: Fără cafea sunt și mai obosit.
translations.da: Uden kaffe er jeg endnu mere træt.
translations.ja: コーヒーがないと、もっと眠い。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing the accusative; expresses absence/privative context.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘ohne’ (accusative).
Finite copular auxiliary (1st person singular present) linking subject and predicative complement.
1st person singular nominative pronoun; subject, postposed due to initial prepositional phrase.
Degree adverb intensifying the following comparative adjective.
Comparative predicative adjective; complement of the copula ‘bin’.
